_meta.purpose: Phase 0 train set — 16 ground-truth task classifications. Authored before task-route.py so Phase 1 acceptance is anti-circular per PLAN-071 §4.1. Each fixture pins the expected classification + minimum required agents/skills. Holdout (4) lives in calibration-holdout.json.

fixtures.rationale: Single file, no veto domain, no canonical, no schema/workflow signal — trivial S

fixtures.task_description: fix typo in error message in src/api/handler.py
fixtures.rationale: Single-file cosmetic fix; no veto, no canonical

fixtures.task_description: fix timing oracle in authentication module src/auth/login.ts:94
fixtures.rationale: Single file (S signal) but auth/timing veto domain → S→M upgrade; security-engineer + code-reviewer VETO floor

fixtures.task_description: add input validation to login form src/auth/form.tsx
fixtures.rationale: Auth domain → M; VETO floor applies

fixtures.task_description: rotate JWT signing secret across api/auth and api/refresh
fixtures.rationale: JWT/auth keywords + ≤4 files → M; VETO floor

fixtures.task_description: refactor decimal-precision rounding in payments module
add new endpoint POST /api/users with input validation
fixtures.rationale: ≤4 files no explicit veto kw match → M default; code-reviewer floor only. CR-relaxation: 'input validation' is dialectical security but not in current veto-keyword regex; classifier emits CR-only floor — additional security review ON OWNER-DISCRETION via override.

fixtures.task_description: extract shared logging helper from user/order/billing services
rewire pytest discovery via conftest restructure
add SCHEMA migration for orders table adding decimal precision column
amend release.yml CI to add SBOM generation step
rewire RAG sidecar to use new vector store under .claude/rag/
fixtures.rationale: rag workflow signal → XL. performance-engineer routing deferred to v1.15.0+ (currently not wired in _agents_for()).

fixtures.task_description: modify check_canonical_edit hook to extend matcher to mcp__* tools
extend tier_policy/_constants VETO_HARDCODE to include new role
fixtures.rationale: canonical-guarded path edit + tier_policy + multi_module signal → XL

fixtures.task_description: investigate cross-test flake across user/order/billing/middleware service modules
fixtures.rationale: 4 distinct module roots (src/user, src/order, src/billing, src/middleware) → multi_module → L

fixtures.task_description: rotate authentication credentials across user/order/billing payment modules
fixtures.rationale: Auth + payment veto domain + multi-module (3 distinct roots) → XL → debate (Codex audit fix #3 — exercises auth+multi → XL XL branch)

fixtures.task_description: tidy up imports across 5 files inside src/utils namespace
fixtures.rationale: >4 same-root files no veto domain → M-default fallback (Codex audit fix #3 — exercises >4 same-root M-default)
